NOTICE OF MOTION AND OTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSE TO INTERROGATORIE AND FOR SANCTIONS THEREON AND MOTION FOR DEEMED ADMISSIONS AND FOR SANCTIONS THEREON; NOTICE OF TENTATIVE RULING, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LHR, INC., AS ASSIGNEE OF JUNIPER BANK HEARING SET FOR DEC-08-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND FOR SANCTIONS AND MOTION TO ORDER REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO PLAINTIFF'S INTERROGATORIES WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $540, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND ORDER FOR DEEMED ADMISSIONS AND FOR SANCTIONS THEREON

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-12-2009 - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN CSR #4780 (D206)

Notice Of Motion And Otion For Order Compelling Response To Interrogatorie And For Sanctions Thereon And Motion For Deemed Admissions And For Sanctions Thereon; Notice Of Tentative Ruling
Off Calendar Dec-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff and moving party: LHR, Inc.
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And For Sanctions And Motion To Order Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted is granted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $540, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
